title: Define minimal R1 HAL and devicetree boundary
description: Why this exists: the R1 MVP needs only enough HAL/Kconfig/devicetree structure to keep board-specific details out of protocol/app code. What needs to be done: finish the minimal pieces of project-LICHEN-h7t5.1 and project-LICHEN-h7t5.3 needed for radio, BLE local transport, identity, GNSS, battery/PMIC, buttons/LEDs, and board identity. Acceptance criteria: required capabilities are represented by explicit Kconfig/devicetree conventions; absent capabilities return deterministic unsupported/unavailable behavior; invalid combinations fail at build time where practical; three independent codereview subagents run after code changes and findings are recorded.
